PCNDto.DescriptionOfChange: The thickness codes for the following list of PNs have been updated.

In order to maximize manufacturing synergies within KYOCERA AVX and KYOCERA Electronic Components Group, which combined their MLCC manufacturing and development resources in 2021, we will have a new global MLCC part numbering system.
AVX Corporation hereby notifies their intention to discontinue it's warehouse and shipping opertations in Atlanta, Georgia and consolidate those operations into the Greenville,S. Carolina facility.
American Technical Ceramics has been acquired by AVX.
LCC Corporation has been acquired by AVX
ELCO has been acquired by AVX
